summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new features for AI Company Workflow Engine completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with proper integration. New features include user-agent chat, PNG/PDF artifact rendering, budget tracking dashboard, and WebSocket real-time updates.
passed_tests: POST /api/chat - user sends message to agent (ceo) and receives agent response
GET /api/chat/history - returns chat history with user messages and agent responses
GET /api/budget/summary - returns budget summary with total_budget, total_spent, remaining, utilization_pct, by_department, by_agent
GET /api/budget/projects - returns per-project budget breakdown with agent costs
POST /api/artifacts/render with render_type=png - renders HTML artifact to PNG successfully
POST /api/artifacts/render with render_type=pdf - renders HTML artifact to PDF successfully
WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/{project_id} accepts connections and shows Live status
Chat drawer: floating blue button visible at bottom-right, opens chat panel on click
Chat drawer: agent selector dropdown works, user can type and send messages, agent responds
Budget page: loads with summary cards (Total Budget, Total Spent, Remaining, Utilization)
Budget page: Department breakdown tab shows bars with proper color coding
Budget page: Agent breakdown tab shows per-agent costs with avatars
Budget page: Project breakdown tab shows per-project costs with agent breakdown
Boardroom: shows WebSocket status indicator (Live/Polling) correctly
Projects page: Render PNG and Render PDF buttons appear on HTML artifacts
Projects page: PNG preview shows base64 image in dialog with proper display
Sidebar shows Budget nav item and navigation works correctly
All existing features still work (dashboard, boardroom, dialogue, delegation, approvals, projects)
Dashboard page loads with stats grid, agent team, and projects list
Boardroom page shows 4-panel layout: participants, dialogue transcript, agenda/approvals/tasks tabs, execution bar
Dialogue page navigation works correctly
Delegation page navigation works correctly
Approvals page navigation works correctly
Projects page shows project list with detail view including tasks, artifacts, meetings tabs
Sidebar navigation works across all pages
System status shows 'System Active' correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (21/21 API endpoints working including 7 new endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components and navigation working including new features)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (End-to-end workflows functioning correctly with new features)
